variants: Uliana Vetrova was born in Hummingbird Haven and has since forged a successful career in the culinary arts. She graduated from Goldspire University, where she cultivated her passion for chocolates. Currently, she serves as a key member of the team at Cinder Sparrow Chocolates. Her contributions to the field did not go unnoticed, receiving the prestigious Pale Spire Honors for her exceptional work. Uliana now resides in the picturesque Umbrellathorn Cove.
